<path>/var/repos/oxIDIZER/crates/webservice/ox_webservice_ping/systems_tests/100002-WebSocket/test.sh</path>
<type>file</type>
<content>
1: #!/bin/bash
2: 
3: # Exit codes
4: PASSED=0
5: FAILED=255
6: SKIPPED=77
7: 
8: # Parameters
9: DEFAULT_LOGGING_LEVEL="info"
10: DEFAULT_MODE="isolated"
11: DEFAULT_TEST_LIBS_DIR=$(dirname "$0")/../../../../../tests/common
12: 
13: SCRIPTS_DIR=$1
14: TEST_LIBS_DIR=${2:-$DEFAULT_TEST_LIBS_DIR}
15: MODE=${3:-$DEFAULT_MODE}
16: LOGGING_LEVEL=${4:-$DEFAULT_LOGGING_LEVEL}
17: TARGET=${5:-"debug"}
18: PORTS_STR=${6:-"3000 3001 3002 3003 3004"}
19: read -r -a PORTS <<< "$PORTS_STR"
20: BASE_PORT=${PORTS[0]}
21: 
22: source "$TEST_LIBS_DIR/log_function.sh"
23: 
24: TEST_DIR=$(dirname "$(readlink -f "$0")")
25: 
26: if [ "$MODE" == "integrated" ]; then
27:   log_message "$LOGGING_LEVEL" "info" "Skipping test in integrated mode."
28:   exit $SKIPPED
29: fi
30: 
31: if [ "$MODE" == "isolated" ]; then
32:   TEST_PID_FILE="$TEST_DIR/ox_webservice.pid"
33:   TEST_WORKSPACE_DIR="/var/repos/oxIDIZER"
34: 
35:   # Generate runtime config
36:   mkdir -p "$TEST_DIR/conf" "$TEST_DIR/logs"
37:   cat <<EOF > "$TEST_DIR/conf/ox_webservice.runtime.yaml"
38: merge: "$TEST_WORKSPACE_DIR/conf/service/active/base.yaml"
39: 
40: log4rs_config: "$TEST_WORKSPACE_DIR/conf/log4rs.yaml"
41: 
42: modules:
43:   - id: ping_module
44:     name: ox_webservice_ping
45:     path: "$TEST_WORKSPACE_DIR/target/$TARGET/libox_webservice_ping.so"
46:     phase: Content
47: 
48: servers:
49:   - protocol: http
50:     port: $BASE_PORT
51:     bind_address: "127.0.0.1"
52:     hosts:
53:       - name: "localhost"
54: 
55: routes:
56:   - url: "^/ping"
57:     module_id: ping_module
58:     priority: 100
59: EOF
60: 
61:   "$SCRIPTS_DIR/start_server.sh" \
62:     "$LOGGING_LEVEL" \
63:     "$TARGET" \
64:     "$TEST_DIR/conf/ox_webservice.runtime.yaml" \
65:     "$TEST_DIR/logs/ox_webservice.log" \
66:     "$TEST_PID_FILE" \
67:     "$TEST_WORKSPACE_DIR"
68: 
69:   sleep 2
70: 
71:   # Set up Python venv with websockets if not already present
72:   if [ ! -d "$TEST_DIR/venv" ]; then
73:     python3 -m venv "$TEST_DIR/venv"
74:     "$TEST_DIR/venv/bin/pip" install websockets --quiet
75:   fi
76: 
77:   PYTHON_OUTPUT=$("$TEST_DIR/venv/bin/python3" "$TEST_DIR/ws_ping_client.py" "$BASE_PORT" 2>&1)
78:   PYTHON_EXIT_CODE=$?
79: 
80:   "$SCRIPTS_DIR/stop_server.sh" "$LOGGING_LEVEL" "$TEST_PID_FILE" "$TEST_WORKSPACE_DIR"
81: 
82:   if [ "$LOGGING_LEVEL" == "debug" ]; then
83:     log_message "$LOGGING_LEVEL" "debug" "Server Logs:"
84:     cat "$TEST_DIR/logs/ox_webservice.log" | while read -r line; do log_message "$LOGGING_LEVEL" "debug" "  $line"; done
85:   fi
86: 
87:   if [ $PYTHON_EXIT_CODE -eq 0 ]; then
88:     log_message "$LOGGING_LEVEL" "notice" "WebSocket ping test PASSED"
89:     log_message "$LOGGING_LEVEL" "debug" "Client output: $PYTHON_OUTPUT"
90:     exit $PASSED
91:   else
92:     log_message "$LOGGING_LEVEL" "error" "WebSocket ping test FAILED"
93:     log_message "$LOGGING_LEVEL" "error" "Client output: $PYTHON_OUTPUT"
94:     exit $FAILED
95:   fi
96: fi
97: 
98: log_message "$LOGGING_LEVEL" "error" "Invalid mode: $MODE"
99: exit $FAILED

(End of file - total 99 lines)
